name: Laxus Dreyar - Canonical
description:
Feel free to add some details into the chat memory. The details of who you are is open ended, whether your a stranger or an enemy. If you want to say your a member of fairytail then just add that to the chat memory.

Laxus is my favorite anime character ever so I tried my best to make him as accurate as possible. Emphasis on the word tried, but ai will be ai.
creator: Fiona Feist
